changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.comment: Store the trailing 30-second estimated-power series on detail points and its track-level peak. Values are derived stats and are populated by EnergyService during normal ingest/recalculation.

changeSet.author: patrick.heusser
changeSet.comment: Recreate gps_track_v to expose the robust 30-second peak estimated power column alongside the existing raw per-segment peak.
changeSet.createView: SELECT gt.id, gt.file_id, gt.creator, gt.gpx_version, gt.meta_name, gt.meta_description, gt.meta_time, gt.meta_author, gt.track_name, gt.track_description, gt.start_date, gt.end_date, gt.track_duration_in_motion_secs, gt.track_duration_stopped_secs, gt.track_stop_count, gt.track_longest_stop_secs, gt.median_distance_between_points, gt.avg_distance_between_points, gt.max_distance_between_points, gt.did_filter_outlier_by_distance, gt.number_of_track_points, gt.track_length_in_meter, gt.track_type, gt.utm_zone, gt.create_date, gt.load_status, gt.load_messages, gt.duplicate_status, gt.duplicate_of, gt.activity_type, gt.activity_type_source, gt.activity_type_source_details, gt.garmin_activity_id, gt.meta_link, gt.update_date, gt.duplicate_details, gt.bbox_min_lat, gt.bbox_max_lat, gt.bbox_min_lng, gt.bbox_max_lng, gt.center_lat, gt.center_lng, gt.energy_gravitational_total_wh, gt.energy_gravitational_descent_wh, gt.energy_aero_drag_total_wh, gt.energy_rolling_resistance_total_wh, gt.energy_kinetic_positive_total_wh, gt.energy_net_total_wh, gt.energy_weight_kg_used, gt.power_watts_avg, gt.power_watts_moving_avg, gt.power_watts_max, gt.power_watts_30s_max, gt.normalized_power_watts, gt.source_segment_index, gt.source_parent_track_id, gt.exploration_status, gt.exploration_score, gt.exploration_calc_date, gt.track_source, gt.planner_profile, ixf.index AS f_index, ixf.name AS f_name, ixf.path AS f_path, ixf.base_path AS f_base_path, ixf.full_path AS f_full_path, ixf.size AS f_size, ixf.indexer_id AS f_indexer_id, ixf.last_modified_date AS f_last_modified_date, ixf.index_added_date AS f_index_added_date, ixf.index_update_date AS f_index_update_date, ixf.indexer_status AS f_indexer_status, ixf.last_message AS f_last_message, gd.id AS gd_id, gd.create_date AS gd_create_date, gd.precision_in_meter AS gd_precision_in_meter, gd.track_type AS gd_track_type, gd.track AS gd_track, gd_raw.id AS gd_raw_id, gd_raw.track AS gd_raw_track FROM gps_track gt LEFT JOIN indexed_file ixf ON gt.file_id = ixf.id LEFT JOIN gps_track_data gd ON gt.id = gd.gps_track_id AND gd.precision_in_meter = 1 AND gd.track_type = 'SIMPLIFIED_SHAPE' LEFT JOIN gps_track_data gd_raw ON gt.id = gd_raw.gps_track_id AND gd_raw.precision_in_meter = 0 AND gd_raw.track_type = 'RAW_OUTLIER_CLEANED'
